description: Ville du Taj Mahal, chef-d'oeuvre de l'architecture moghole et islamique, Agra fut la capitale de l'empire moghol avec son fort rouge classé UNESCO.

description_en: Agra, in India, is a halal-friendly destination with a Halal Trust Score of 4.5/5. Muslim travelers will find 17 halal restaurants listed, 1 mosques, real-time prayer times and the Qibla direction — a complete guide to travel with peace of mind.
metaDescription_en: Halal guide to Agra: 17 halal restaurants listed, 1 mosques, prayer times and tips for Muslim travelers. Halal Trust Score 4.5/5.
